race.comment: GRAFFITI TYCOON (3) brought sharp trials to Warwick Farm on debut and impressed, narrowly beaten as a $2.7F. Is still new and didn't get it easy. Is sure to have taken fitness and learning, and Lloyd stays aboard the gelding, and the inside gate should advantage. Can go one better. LOERA (11) just missed as a $2.4F at Rosehill on debut, coming off two metro trial wins. Will be sharper today and will likely push forward. Will get every chance to make amends. A gap then to KAWERAU (4), who started at big odds on debut but ran a bold race, beaten 1.5 lengths over 1200m at Rosehill. He'd been well educated and hit the line. JMac replaces Lloyd, and he goes into the trifectas at least. Ditto IN A TIZZY (10), who races forward and has scope for further improvement. Comes back to a shorter sprint and maps well.
